title: Mood Manipulation and PST, Experiment 2
description: This dataset comprises behavioral and neuroimaging data from a reinforcement learning task administered to 50 healthy control participants under two mood conditions: sad mood manipulation (n=25) and happy mood manipulation (n=25). The task includes training and testing phases with mood induction occurring before each training block. Data were collected between 2019-2021 at the Cognitive Rhythms and Computation Lab at the University of New Mexico.
methods_description: Reinforcement learning task implemented in MATLAB with mood manipulation administered prior to each training block. Participants were assigned to either sad or happy mood manipulation conditions (n=25 each). Task structure included distinct training and testing phases.
